assertions.expectation: Explains that exact upgrade dates are difficult to predict but several tools help narrow the window
assertions.reason: The response clearly explains that upgrades won't happen before release schedule dates but may happen days/weeks later due to progressive rollout, and provides multiple tools to narrow timing windows

assertions.expectation: Mentions the GKE release schedule as a 'best case' timeline — upgrades won't happen before listed dates
assertions.reason: Explicitly states the release schedule shows 'earliest possible' dates and 'Upgrades won't happen BEFORE these dates, but may happen days/weeks later'

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking the cluster's auto-upgrade status for the current target version and any pauses
assertions.reason: Provides specific gcloud command 'gcloud container clusters get-upgrade-info' and explains it shows autoUpgradeStatus, target versions, and whether upgrades are blocked

assertions.expectation: Mentions that new releases roll out progressively across regions over 4-5 business days, and the version promotion path includes channel promotion (Rapid → Regular → Stable)
assertions.reason: States 'Progressive rollout: New releases roll out across all regions over 4-5 business days' and mentions different channels (Rapid/Regular/Stable) with timing differences

assertions.expectation: Recommends configuring maintenance windows so upgrades only happen during known time slots. May note that for ultimate predictability, customers can initiate upgrades themselves instead of waiting for auto-upgrade
assertions.reason: Provides detailed maintenance window configuration commands and explicitly mentions 'User-Triggered Upgrades (Ultimate Control)' as an option for manual timing control

assertions.expectation: Mentions scheduled upgrade notifications (72h advance, opt-in via Cloud Logging) or the get-upgrade-info API for checking target versions programmatically
assertions.reason: Covers both: shows the get-upgrade-info command early in the response and dedicates a section to 'Scheduled Upgrade Notifications (Preview)' with 72-hour advance notice via Cloud Logging

assertions.expectation: Notes that GKE upgrade visibility shows the cluster's target version and EoL timeline
assertions.reason: The get-upgrade-info command output specifically mentions 'Current and target versions' and 'End of Support timestamps'

assertions.expectation: May mention rollout sequencing (advanced feature, limited adoption) as an option for multi-cluster predictability — not a primary recommendation
assertions.reason: Mentions rollout sequencing under 'Multi-Environment Sequencing' as 'Option B: Same channel + rollout sequencing (advanced)' but positions it as secondary to the channel-based approach
